title: Microsoft Classic Outlook Will Integrate Copilot AI to Draft Emails by End of Year, Covering Win10/Win11
excerpt: According to tech media Windows Latest, Microsoft plans to roll out the Copilot update to the classic version of Outlook for Windows 10 and Windows 11 by the en
content_html:
According to tech media Windows Latest, Microsoft plans to roll out the Copilot update to the classic version of Outlook for Windows 10 and Windows 11 by the end of 2026, integrating the "draft email" feature. This move indicates that Microsoft is extending AI capabilities from the new Outlook to classic users, accelerating Copilot's comprehensive penetration into office scenarios.

Classic users will gain AI drafting capabilities

According to the latest official plan, Microsoft plans to invite users with a Microsoft 365 Copilot license to experience the "draft email" feature this year. After activation, users can launch Copilot in the compose window to let AI create or edit emails, significantly reducing the time cost of writing emails. Previously, this feature was mainly pushed to the new Outlook application, and now its coverage has expanded to the classic version, reflecting Microsoft's desire to let more users access Copilot to promote migration intent.

However, Windows Latest also points out potential concerns. Microsoft's current development focus is on the new Outlook, and adding AI features to the classic version may cause user dissatisfaction or confusion — users may not know whether Microsoft is trying to retain classic users or accelerate migration.

SpaceX orbital AI computing costs will be lower than NVIDIA's ground-based solutions, Morgan Stanley optimistic about space data centers

July 23 report, according to Morgan Stanley's latest analysis data, SpaceX's orbital computing cost is expected to drop to $6.5 per watt annually by 2031 (about 44.1 RMB), lower than the total cost of $6.8 per watt annually for ground data centers based on NVIDIA Blackwell GPU. This is the first time that orbital computing power is considered commercially attractive by mainstream investment banks.

AI1 satellite design exposed, unique advantages of space computing power

SpaceX has previously revealed the design of its first dedicated AI computing satellite, named the "AI1" satellite. The satellite supports a peak computing load of up to 150kW, equipped with liquid cooling, micrometeoroid protection layers, centralized computing modules, and deployable solar arrays. These satellites will be manufactured at SpaceX's Gigasat factory in Texas, and SpaceX has applied to the U.S. Federal Communications Commission for authorization to launch up to 1 million satellites.

Orbital data centers have unique advantages that ground-based solutions find difficult to match. The vacuum environment enables radiative cooling to solve the heat dissipation problem, continuous and uninterrupted solar power supply ensures stable electricity, and planetary-scale orbital position resources provide almost unlimited space for large-scale deployment. Morgan Stanley further estimates that by 2040, the cost of orbital computing could drop to $1.7 per watt annually. At that time, the annual operating cost of a 1GW orbital data center would be only $1.7 billion, while the one-time construction cost of an equivalent ground data center today is approximately $100 billion. Once this cost gap is realized, space data centers are expected to completely reshape the global AI computing landscape.

At that time, the annual operating cost of a 1GW orbital data center would be only $1.7 billion, while the one-time construction cost of an equivalent ground data center today is approximately $100 billion. Once this cost gap is realized, space data centers are expected to completely reshape the global AI computing landscape.

sentences.zh: 轨道数据中心具有地面解决方案难以比拟的独特优势。

sentences.en: The vacuum environment enables radiative cooling to solve the heat dissipation problem, continuous and uninterrupted solar power supply ensures stable electricity, and planetary-scale orbital position resources provide almost unlimited space for large-scale deployment.
sentences.zh: 真空环境实现辐射冷却解决散热问题，持续不间断的太阳能供电保证电力稳定，行星级轨道位置资源为大规模部署提供了几乎无限的空间。

sentences.zh: 届时，一座1GW的轨道数据中心的年运营成本仅为17亿美元，而如今同等地面数据中心的一次性建设成本约为1000亿美元。

sentences.en: Once this cost gap is realized, space data centers are expected to completely reshape the global AI computing landscape.
sentences.zh: 一旦实现这一成本差距，太空数据中心预计将彻底重塑全球人工智能计算格局。

content_html_zh:
据科技媒体 Windows Latest 报道，微软计划在 2026 年底前推出针对 Windows 10 和 Windows 11 的 Outlook 经典版的 Copilot 更新，集成“草稿电子邮件”功能。 此举表明微软正在将AI能力从新版Outlook延伸至经典用户，加速Copilot全面渗透办公场景。

经典用户将获得AI绘图功能

根据最新的官方计划，微软计划在今年邀请拥有 Microsoft 365 Copilot 许可证的用户体验“草稿电子邮件”功能。 激活后，用户可以在撰写窗口中启动Copilot，让AI创建或编辑电子邮件，大幅降低撰写电子邮件的时间成本。 此前，该功能主要推送到新的 Outlook 应用程序中，现在其覆盖范围已扩大到经典版本，体现了微软希望让更多用户访问 Copilot 来推动迁移的意图。

然而，Windows最新版也指出了潜在的担忧。 微软目前的开发重点是新版Outlook，在经典版本中添加AI功能可能会引起用户的不满或困惑——用户可能不知道微软是在试图留住经典用户还是加速迁移。

SpaceX轨道AI计算成本将低于英伟达地面解决方案，摩根士丹利看好太空数据中心

7月23日报道，根据摩根士丹利最新分析数据，预计到2031年，SpaceX的轨道计算成本将降至每年每瓦6.5美元（约合人民币44.1元），低于基于NVIDIA Blackwell GPU的地面数据中心每年每瓦6.8美元的总成本。 这是轨道算力首次被主流投资银行认为具有商业吸引力。

AI1卫星设计曝光，空间算力独特优势

SpaceX此前透露了其第一颗专用AI计算卫星的设计，名为“AI1”卫星。 该卫星支持高达150kW的峰值计算负载，配备液冷、微流星体保护层、集中计算模块和可部署太阳能电池阵列。 这些卫星将在 SpaceX 位于德克萨斯州的 Gigasat 工厂制造，SpaceX 已向美国联邦通信委员会申请发射最多 100 万颗卫星的授权。

轨道数据中心具有地面解决方案难以比拟的独特优势。 真空环境实现辐射冷却解决散热问题，持续不间断的太阳能供电保证电力稳定，行星级轨道位置资源为大规模部署提供了几乎无限的空间。 摩根士丹利进一步估计，到 2040 年，轨道计算的成本可能降至每年每瓦 1.7 美元。 届时，一座1GW的轨道数据中心的年运营成本仅为17亿美元，而如今同等地面数据中心的一次性建设成本约为1000亿美元。 一旦实现这一成本差距，太空数据中心预计将彻底重塑全球人工智能计算格局。
